en_title: Sony Settles With Fired Marathon Game Director Who Sued PlayStation and Bungie for More Than $200 Million, Adds Name to Credits
cn_title: 索尼?PlayStation尼Bungie与《失落星船：马拉松》前总监达成和解
subtitle: 名字重回制作名单
opus_summary: 索尼已与曾执导《失落星船：马拉松》的Christopher Barrett达成和解，其姓名将加入游戏制作名单。Barrett此前否认不当行为指控，并就遭解雇一事起诉索尼和Bungie。

paragraphs.en: Sony has reached a settlement with former developer Christopher Barrett, who it had accused of sexual misconduct. As a result of the settlement, Barrett will be added to the credits of recently released extraction shooter Marathon.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼已与前开发人员Christopher Barrett达成和解。索尼此前曾指控他存在性行为不当问题；根据和解结果，他的名字将被加入新近发售的撤离射击游戏《失落星船：马拉松》制作名单。

paragraphs.en: Barrett, who was the original game director of Marathon, was fired after an internal misconduct investigation. Bloomberg reported that Barrett was fired in the spring of 2024 after he was accused by several female employees of inappropriate behavior.
paragraphs.cn: Barrett是《失落星船：马拉松》的原游戏总监，在内部不当行为调查后被解雇。彭博社曾报道称，数名女性员工指控他行为不当后，他于2024年春季遭解雇。

paragraphs.en: Barrett released a statement at the time saying that he believed he had always acted with integrity and respect, and that he was truly sorry if any interaction had made anyone uncomfortable.
paragraphs.cn: Barrett当时发表声明称，他相信自己一贯秉持诚信、尊重并支持同事；若任何互动让人感到不适，他对此深表歉意。

paragraphs.en: Barrett then sued Sony and Bungie for more than $200 million, denying the allegations and claiming his firing was intended to avoid paying out nearly $50 million owed under his employment agreement. Barrett's lawsuit alleged that he was scapegoated for Bungie's overall struggles in the wake of the PlayStation acquisition, and that the investigation was used as cause to fire him after requesting FMLA leave.
paragraphs.cn: 随后，Barrett起诉索尼和Bungie，索赔超过2亿美元(约合人民币14亿元)。他否认相关指控，并称解雇他的目的在于避免支付其雇佣协议中近5000万美元(约合人民币3.4亿元)的应付款项。诉状还称，他成了PlayStation收购后Bungie整体困境的替罪羊，且他申请《家庭与医疗休假法》休假后，调查被用作解雇理由。

paragraphs.en: Now, Barrett has issued a statement on social media indicating that all parties have reached a settlement. A joint statement confirms Barrett’s name has been added to the Marathon credits to reflect his role as original Marathon game director.
paragraphs.cn: 如今，Barrett在社交媒体上表示各方已达成和解。联合声明确认，为反映其作为《失落星船：马拉松》原游戏总监的角色，其姓名已加入制作名单。

paragraphs.en: The outcome is one I am very satisfied with, Barrett said, and I am grateful to everyone who stood by me. Closing this chapter allows me to focus my attention on what’s next on my gaming journey, and I look forward to what lies ahead.
paragraphs.cn: Barrett表示：「我对这一结果非常满意，也感谢每一位支持我的人。结束这一篇章后，我可以专注于游戏生涯的下一步，并期待未来。」

paragraphs.en: Barrett now lists his game credits as co-creator of Destiny and original game director of Marathon. He was also environment art director on Halo as part of a near 25-year career at Bungie.
paragraphs.cn: Barrett目前的履历将他列为《命运》共同创作者和《失落星船：马拉松》原游戏总监。在Bungie近25年的职业生涯中，他还曾担任《光环》环境美术总监。

paragraphs.en: While Bungie’s legal issue with Barrett is now over, the studio’s problems persist. Last month, nearly 300 staff who worked at the company’s Bellevue, Washington office lost their jobs, according to official records. It is unknown how many staff remain at Bungie following the cuts, although the studio was reported to have employed 850 staff as of 2024.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管Bungie与Barrett的法律纠纷已告一段落，工作室的困境仍未结束。官方记录显示，上月其华盛顿州贝尔维尤办公室近300名员工失业。裁员后Bungie还剩多少员工尚不清楚；据报道，工作室在2024年约有850名员工。

paragraphs.en: It was Bungie's third round of layoffs in three years. According to The Seattle Times, Bungie once had 1,000 employees in Bellevue. Between October 2023 and July 2024, Bungie laid off around 320 staff.
paragraphs.cn: 这是Bungie三年内第三轮裁员。据《西雅图时报》报道，Bungie曾在贝尔维尤拥有1000名员工；2023年10月至2024年7月间，工作室裁撤约320人。

paragraphs.en: Hermen Hulst said a significant number of employees were affected, hitting most of the Destiny team and some Marathon team members. He described the decision as difficult and painful, but necessary to align resources with current priorities and long-term goals.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼互动娱乐工作室业务集团CEO赫尔曼·赫尔斯特表示，大量员工受到影响，涉及《命运》团队的大部分成员以及部分《失落星船：马拉松》团队成员。他称该决定「艰难」且「痛苦」，但为使工作室资源符合当前优先事项和长期目标而有必要。

paragraphs.en: The news followed the end of new content for Destiny 2, and the release of Marathon, which has struggled for players. Sony has insisted it remains committed to Marathon, whose team is also said to be working on incubation efforts for future projects.
paragraphs.cn: 这一消息发生在《命运2》停止推出新内容、且《失落星船：马拉松》上线后玩家表现不佳之际。索尼坚持称仍将支持《失落星船：马拉松》，其团队据称也在为未来项目进行孵化工作。

paragraphs.en: Reports say Bungie studio head Justin Truman stepped down, while former VP of Operations Poria Torkan has reportedly taken charge of the studio.
paragraphs.cn: 报道称，去年接替Pete Parsons的Bungie工作室负责人Justin Truman已辞职；前运营副总裁Poria Torkan据称已接管工作室。

paragraphs.en: Bungie has struggled financially for some time, and reportedly was on the brink of closure before Sony bought the studio back in 2022 for $3.6 billion. Sony recently reported a $765 million impairment loss due to underperformance of Bungie specifically.
paragraphs.cn: Bungie长期面临财务困难；据报道，在索尼于2022年以36亿美元(约合人民币245亿元)收购前，工作室一度濒临关闭。索尼近日还披露，Bungie表现不及预期造成7.65亿美元(约合人民币52亿元)的减值损失。

paragraphs.en: Bungie's issues with Destiny 2 reportedly began around last summer's Edge of Fate expansion, which was said to have underperformed. The franchise was allegedly not relaunched as Destiny Infinity after it was decided the costs and risks were too high, especially in the context of supporting Marathon.
paragraphs.cn: 据称，Bungie在《命运2》上的问题始于去年夏季表现不佳的「命运边缘」扩展内容。由于成本和风险过高，尤其还需支持《失落星船：马拉松》，工作室最终没有将该系列重启为「命运无限」。

paragraphs.en: Forbes reported that after December's Star Wars-themed Renegades crossover expansion performed even worse and failed to change sales or retention, Bungie began discussing different scenarios for Destiny 2's future.
paragraphs.cn: 《福布斯》报道称，去年12月以《星球大战》为主题的「叛逆者」联动扩展表现甚至更差，未能改变销量或留存趋势后，Bungie开始讨论《命运2》未来的不同方案。

paragraphs.en: Destiny Infinity would have been a relaunch alongside a return to one big expansion model, but the idea was dropped. Destiny 3 was also considered, but there have been no signs that it is in development, with production cost cited as the key issue.
paragraphs.cn: 「命运无限」原本会是一次重启，并回归每年一部大型扩展内容的模式，但该想法后来被放弃。《命运3》也曾被考虑，不过目前没有迹象显示其正在开发，制作成本被视为关键问题。

paragraphs.en: Destiny 2 launched on PlayStation 4 and Xbox One on September 6, 2017, with a PC version following a month later. Bungie and Activision officially parted ways in January 2019, ending their 10-year publishing deal five years early.
paragraphs.cn: 《命运2》于2017年9月6日登陆PS4和XBOX One，PC版一个月后推出。Bungie与动视在2019年1月正式分手，提前五年结束了原定十年的发行协议。

paragraphs.en: After self-publishing Destiny, Bungie still could not escape financial troubles and layoffs as expansions failed to meet expectations and its player base declined. Marathon launched in early March with a reported budget of more than $250 million, and analysts say it too has failed to meet sales expectations.
paragraphs.cn: 在自行发行《命运》后，Bungie仍未摆脱财务困境和裁员：扩展内容未达预期，玩家群体也在流失。据报道，《失落星船：马拉松》于3月初上线，预算超过2.5亿美元(约合人民币17亿元)，分析师称其同样未能达到销售预期。
